t22.title: Web crawler for curiosity
t22.notes: One page → follow the link that catches my eye → keep walking until cold or bored. No corporate wrapper. Mine to ship.
t22.result: Web crawler built and tested — walks links out of curiosity, stops when the thread goes cold.

t23.notes: One page, grab links, follow one, keep walking. No corporate wrapper. Simple spine.
